nasb.text: Your holy people possessed Your sanctuary for a little while, Our adversaries have trodden it down.

esv.text: Your holy people held possession for a little while; our adversaries have trampled down your sanctuary.

cnv.text: 你的聖民不過暫時得著你的聖所， 我們的敵人已經踐踏了你的聖所。

ccb.text: 你的圣民曾短暂地拥有你的圣所， 如今它已被我们的敌人踏平。

csbs.text: 你圣洁的子民短暂地拥有了你的圣所， 我们的敌人就践踏了它。
